reference: I have a weird sore on the ridge of the head of my penis. It looks like a canker sore would, but it is on my penis. It also has this awful smell no matter how much I clean it. It is very sensitive and painful to touch. It has been here for about two weeks and won't go away! The area around the sore is hardened. I just want it to go away so I can go back to my normal life! Help!
text: I have a weird saw on the ridge of the head of my penis. It looks like a canker saw would. It is on my penis. It also has this awful smell no matter how much I clean it. It is very sensitive and painful to touch. It has been here for about two weeks and won't go away. The area around the saw is hardened. I just want it to go away so I can go back to my normal life. Help!
